string.text: Stalker, get over here. I need someone who knows which end of the rifle lead comes out of, and you look in shape.
You look like you haven't slept in days. What's the problem?

There's a new smuggler baron named Kovalchuk. He’s set up a toll on the main route. He's bleeding our rookies dry, confiscating their artifacts, and leaving them to the mutants. I sent one of my scouts, a new kid named Artyom, to trail Kovalchuk to his main stash. We were going to hit him where it hurts.
Don't come to rookie asking for help.
Let me guess. Artyom missed his check in.

Two hours ago. Artyom is a ghost. His last coordinates were the tunnel on the eastern edge of Cordon. I can't leave the village undefended to go looking for him. I need you to go up there, find Artyom, and find out what Kovalchuk is up to.
I'll find him, Wolf. Hang tight.
Sorry, I'm not a charity. Sidorovich pays me for work. What are you offering?

I don't have Sidorovich's rubles, but I have a stash of AP rounds and some meds but if you really impress me..I might throw something extra waiting for you if you bring me solid intel. Just get it done.
Kovalchuk? He has to be travelling with heavily armed guards? At least send me with someone.
Hmm to be truthful, I've been holding back Mia from going there herself, have a chat with her. She's new here.
Wolf said you've been wanting to track down Artyom.
He did? Good. I've gone on a couple expeditions with him before and don't want to leave him behind.
Alright..maybe i got something stashed. Take it now and get it done.
Who do you think you are? Go now or ill find someone else.
